name: PM Slim-Fit Grey Trouser
description: PM-brand slim-fit grey formal trouser in medium-weight twill. Flat-front cut with side pockets and clean straight leg — a reliable match for a crisp white or patterned dress shirt for office and event wear.

name: VioBoss Slim-Fit Grey Chino
description: VioBoss slim-fit grey chino with a soft cotton-stretch finish. Tapered leg, side pockets and clean waistband — dresses up with a shirt and blazer or down with a polo.

name: Classic Grey Chino
description: Clean slim-fit grey chino in a medium-weight cotton twill. Versatile, dependable and easy to match — office-ready with a dress shirt, weekend-ready with a tee.

name: Jeep Khaki Tan Chino
description: Jeep-brand khaki tan chino in sturdy cotton twill. Straight fit with reinforced stitching and side pockets — built for everyday wear with a polo, tee or casual shirt.

name: VioBoss Olive Slim Chino
nameSwahili: Chino ya Rangi ya Zaituni ya VioBoss
description: VioBoss olive-green slim chino in soft cotton-stretch. Tapered cut with clean side pockets — earthy tone pairs effortlessly with white, cream or light-blue shirts.

name: Seeng John Olive Chino
nameSwahili: Chino ya Rangi ya Zaituni ya Seeng John
description: Seeng John olive chino with straight tapered leg and clean flat-front waistband. Rich olive hue with a soft hand-feel — a smart alternative to classic khaki.

name: Renguler Navy Slim Chino
nameSwahili: Chino ya Bluu Nzito ya Renguler
description: Renguler navy slim chino in medium-weight cotton twill. Clean tapered leg with side pockets — the dependable navy that works with every shirt in the wardrobe.

name: Zani Black Slim Trouser
description: Zani slim-fit black trouser in smooth twill. Flat-front, tapered leg — sharp with a crisp white dress shirt for formal events, easy with a polo for casual days.

name: Burberry Camel Tan Chino
nameSwahili: Chino ya Rangi ya Ngamia ya Burberry
description: Burberry camel-tan chino in premium cotton twill. Elevated khaki tone with clean lines — the premium neutral trouser that pairs with anything from navy blazers to pastel shirts.
